Name: Brown-Forman Corporation
Description: The Brown Forman Corporation is one of the largest American-owned companies in the spirits and wine business. Based in Louisville, Kentucky, it manufactures several well known brands throughout the world, including Jack Daniel's, Early Times, Old Forester, Woodford Reserve, GlenDronach, BenRiach, Glenglassaugh, Finlandia, Herradura, Korbel, and Chambord.
Address: 850 DIXIE HIGHWAY, LOUISVILLE, KY, UNITED STATES, 40210
